case_title: OLGA TIKHONOVA et al VS. TD AMERITRADE, INC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-19-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED. (506).
DEFENDANT'S REPLY IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR AN ORDER DISMISSING ACTION FOR IMPROPER VENUE AND COMPELLING ARBITRATION; FILED BY DEFENDANT TD AMERITRADE, INC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIKHONOVA, OLGA SEVERINOV, SERGEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TD AMERITRADE, INC $1,821.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,881.00, DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED.
